## What & why

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? Link the issue it closes. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] ✨ feat — new feature
- [ ] 🐛 fix — bug fix
- [ ] 🧹 chore — tooling / config / deps
- [ ] 📝 docs — documentation only
- [ ] ♻️ refactor — no behavior change
- [ ] ✅ test — tests only

## How was this tested?

<!-- Steps, devices/simulators, or automated tests. -->

- [ ] iOS simulator
- [ ] Android emulator
- [ ] Unit tests (`npm test`)

## Screenshots / screen recording

<!-- Required for any UI change. Before/after if relevant. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] My branch is up to date with `main`
- [ ] `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, and `npm test` pass locally
- [ ] I followed the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format
- [ ] I updated docs (README / comments) where relevant
- [ ] No secrets, keys, or `.env` files are committed
- [ ] I requested a review from at least one teammate
